theorem:  insertionsort_correct
sample:   0
attempt:  fix_3

[proof]
intro l
induction l with
| nil =>
  constructor
  · simp [insertionsort, Sorted.nil]
  · exact lemma_hint_21
| cons x xs ih =>
  rcases ih with ⟨hs, hp⟩
  constructor
  ·
    have hins : ∀ ys, Sorted ys → Sorted (insert_ x ys) := by
      intro ys hy
      induction ys with
      | nil =>
        simp [insert_]
        exact Sorted.singleton
      | cons y ys ihys =>
        cases ys with
        | nil =>
          simp [insert_]
          by_cases h : x < y
          · simp [h]
            exact Sorted.cons Sorted.singleton (by intro hyx; exact (lt_irrefl _) (hyx.trans h))
          · simp [h]
            exact Sorted.cons Sorted.singleton h
        | cons z zs =>
          have s' : Sorted (z :: zs) := lemma_hint_33 y z zs hy
          have ih' : Sorted (insert_ x (z :: zs)) := ihys s'
          by_cases hxy : x < y
          · simp [insert_, hxy]
            exact Sorted.cons hy (by intro hyx; exact (lt_irrefl _) (hyx.trans hxy))
          · by_cases hxz : x < z
            · simpa [insert_, hxy] using lemma_hint_28 y x hxy z zs hy ih' hxz
            · have htail : Sorted (z :: insert_ x zs) := by simpa [insert_, hxz] using ih'
              simpa [insert_, hxy, hxz] using lemma_hint_24 x y z zs hy htail
    simpa [insertionsort] using hins (insertionsort xs) hs
  · exact lemma_hint_3 x xs

[lean result]
OK
